title: 10th Class
subTitle: Childhood sweethearts Srinu and Anjali get married after being together for many years. However, they do not realise that fate has other plans as their lives take an unexpected turn.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Tirupathi
subTitle: Tirupathi's pregnant sister dies at the hospital due to the negligence of a doctor who wanted a bribe. Enraged, Tirupathi sets out to seek revenge, but it affects the kin of his close friend.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Dorikithe Dongalu
subTitle: Shoban Babu, a thief, turns into a vigilante after watching the atrocities of fellow criminals around him. Raju, a gangster, vows to kill Shoban.

title: Bagunnaraa
subTitle: A young woman meets a man and falls in love with him but things take a turn when her father learns about their relationship and he plans to separate them.

title: Pellaindi Kaani
subTitle: A woman marries a wealthy widow's son to save her father's life, but complications ensue when the widow's relatives scheme to usurp her fortune.

title: Letha Manasulu
subTitle: Two friends, Raju and Lakshmi, never reveal their love for each other and end up with different life partners. Years later, when Raju and his wife come across Lakshmi, they find that she is a widow.

title: Mahankali
subTitle: When Mahankali, an honest cop, is handed the responsibility of finding the terrorists behind the Hyderabad serial bomb blasts, he becomes friends with one of them to fulfil his mission.

title: Jailer
subTitle: Muthuvel Pandian, a retired prison guard, sets out on a quest for revenge after his son goes missing while investigating a smuggling case.

title: Ante Sundharaniki
subTitle: An interfaith couple spins a web of lies to get their conservative families' approval for marriage, but they themselves end up badly entangled in it.

title: Ante Sundharaniki
subTitle: An interfaith couple spins a web of lies to get their conservative families' approval for marriage, but they themselves end up badly entangled in it.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Muddula Mogudu
subTitle: A couple leads a content life and the wife is proud that her husband takes good care of her. However, their relationship faces a setback and they must overcome it together.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Manavoori Maruthi
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Inspector Pratap
subTitle: Fired for challenging corruption, Pratap, an honest cop, refuses to back down. Subsequently, he creates a bold plan to expose the criminal and restore justice.

title: Ottesi Cheputunna
subTitle: Surya, an orphan, believes he is unlucky. However, when he sees Divya's picture, things get better and he starts believing she brings him luck. He falls in love with her, but, she loves another man.

title: Prudhvi Narayana
subTitle: Prudhvi, a sincere police officer, lives with his mother and wife. He is forced to find the details of his estranged when he notices his look-alike at an auction.

title: Maharaja
subTitle: After his home is broken into, a barber sets out to get revenge and informs the police about the incident. However, the police are unsure about the missing entity in question.

title: Aagadu
subTitle: Ramakrishnan, a police constable, is posted as a driver at Elathur women police station. He has to deal with the fiery sub-inspector, Arundhathi Varma, to save his job.

title: Ragada
subTitle: Satya, a money-minded man, arrives in Hyderabad and starts working for a gangster, GK. However, he soon becomes the target of another gangster, Peddanna.

title: Ragada
subTitle: Satya, a money-minded man, arrives in Hyderabad and starts working for a gangster, GK. However, he soon becomes the target of another gangster, Peddanna.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Ummadi Kutumbam
subTitle: Three loving brothers, who are all married, live together as a joint family. However, misunderstandings crop up and threaten their relationships with each other.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Kirathakudu
subTitle: Charan, a sportsman, hates his father, Chakravarthy, who is a CBI officer. However, when Chakravarthy gets kidnapped by the criminal gang he was chasing, Charan decides to save him.

title: Balaram
subTitle: Tough policeman Balaram meets two lovers by accident. His endeavour to unite the lovers brings him into a direct clash with a rich businessman, who is the father of the girl.

title: Aahvaanam
subTitle: Ravi Kumar, a money-minded man, decides to end his marriage with Rajeshwari after learning that Sireesha, a rich woman, is interested in him. He lies to Sireesha that he has applied for a divorce.

title: Major Chandrakanth
subTitle: After Mohan kills his sister's lover, he runs away and hides in Major Chandrakanth's house. Later, Srikanth, the older son of Chandrakanth, is assigned the case.

title: Billa
subTitle: When Billa, a don, dies at the hands of ACP Murthy, he is replaced by Ranga, his lookalike, to infiltrate the gang. When Murthy is killed, Ranga is trapped since only Murthy knew the truth.

title: Katamarayudu
subTitle: In an attempt to give up his violent past, a man decides to change himself for the woman he loves. Soon, when his lover's family is threatened by evil forces, he takes matters into his own hands.

title: Pelli Pustakam
subTitle: A married couple face a financial crisis, but the company that offers them a job does not recruit couples. To solve their problems, they decide to lie about their marital status.
